title: UIAO Runtime Provenance Envelope
description: Schema for the provenance envelope every canonical claim emitted by a UIAO adapter MUST carry. Promotes 15_ProvenanceProfile.qmd §3 from documentation prose into the wire-format contract. Validated inline at BaseAdapter.emit() per ADR-070.

claim_id.description: Deterministic claim URI of the form urn:uiao:claim:{domain}:{claim_type}:{uuid}. Required by adr-005 canonical claim schema.

issuer_identity.description: Identifier of the issuing principal as resolved against the identity plane. Default identity plane is Entra ID; the value is an Entra object ID (UUID). Federal-only deployments may substitute a non-Microsoft identity plane via the adapter manifest's identity_resolver field.

source_system.description: Name and version of the originating system in the form {system_name}:{version}. Examples: ssa-titan:v2.4.1, irs-modernization-platform:v3.0.0.

source_classification.description: Provenance class of the claim per 15_ProvenanceProfile.qmd §4. authoritative = emitted directly by the truth source; derived = computed from a single authoritative source; synthesized = assembled from multiple sources with confidence weighting.

extraction_timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the source record was extracted from the source system. UTC required.

extraction_method.description: How the source record was acquired. api = synchronous API call; batch = scheduled bulk export; stream = event-driven push; manual = operator-curated.

transformation_chain.description: Ordered transformation steps applied between extraction and emission. Empty array for authoritative claims; one or more entries for derived/synthesized. No step may be removed or reordered after sealing.

step.description: 1-based ordinal position in the chain. MUST be strictly increasing.

transform.description: Canonical transform name. Refers to a registered transform in src/uiao/canon/transform-registry.yaml (deferred to Phase 2).

applied_by.description: Adapter ID that applied this transform. MUST match an active entry in adapter-registry.yaml or modernization-registry.yaml.

applied_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of transform application. UTC required.

lineage_hash.description: Hex-encoded SHA-256 of the canonical-JSON serialization of the source record at extraction time. The hash is computed once at seal() and never recomputed; runtime chain verification compares this stored hash against a re-computed hash of the source record fetched at verification time.

schema_version.description: Envelope schema version. Versioned per the canon-change ADR process; no in-place schema mutation.

signature.description: Hex-encoded SHA-256 thumbprint of the mTLS certificate that signed the envelope. The substrate verifies the thumbprint resolves to a trusted issuer registered in the adapter's trust-anchor: declaration (per UIAO_110 trust-chain canon).

consent_envelope.description: Optional consent-envelope reference. Required when the claim is subject to authorization gating (e.g., citizen data with explicit consent scope). Empty/absent means no consent gating applies. Validated against 17_ConsentEnvelope.qmd at adapter emit per Phase 2.

consent_id.description: URI of the consent record this claim is governed by.

scope.description: Authorized claim destinations under the consent envelope.
